# meltcloud_elastic_fleet (Resource)

An Elastic Fleet is a pool of compute resources on a cluster which can be sliced into Elastic Quotas for consumption by other organizations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# create cluster
resource "meltcloud_cluster" "example" {
  name           = "melt02"
  version        = "1.35"
  pod_cidr       = "10.36.0.0/16"
  service_cidr   = "10.96.0.0/16"
  dns_service_ip = "10.96.0.10"
}

# create elastic fleet backed by the cluster
resource "meltcloud_elastic_fleet" "example" {
  cluster_id = meltcloud_cluster.example.id
  name       = "fleet1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (Number) ID of the associated cluster
- `name` (String) Name of the Elastic Fleet

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Internal ID of the Elastic Fleet on meltcloud
- `status` (String) Status of the Elastic Fleet
